name: Snagging Hook Snare
description:
This snare snags a creature with its wicked metal hooks. The first creature to enter the square takes ,5d8[slashing]]{5d8 piercing damage and 5d8 slashing damage}, with a save.

On a critical failure, the hooks piercing its flesh make the creature until it successfully [[/act escape show-dc=all dc=29]]{Escapes}.
